title: Сontrasting sounds effects
description: Our set of resources changes the music and sounds in the game! Contrasting music and sounds will refresh your Minecraft experience
body:
# our [discord](https://discord.gg/8hFNJ3dwPs)
- ⬆️ You can contact us via discord. ⬆️
- This resource pack replaces the default sounds and music with more contrasting ones, giving the game a new, vibrant style. The music has become 8-bit and contrasting, and the sounds have been updated. With this pack, you can immerse yourself even more in the gameplay. I hope you enjoy it;)
